name: tdoc
description: Prompt-native interactive HTML docs — open-source community implementation of Jesse Pollak's bdocs idea. Generate self-contained HTML from a prompt, comment on text + artifacts, publish to your own Cloudflare Worker for free always-on sharing.

inspiration.name: Jesse Pollak
inspiration.note: All credit to Jesse for the original concept and framing. tdoc is an open-source community take, not a port.
